target_bilibili_video: 无广 | 12台2026年新款扫地机 横向对比视频（第一期） (No-ad | head-to-head comparison of 12 new 2026 robot vacuums, Episode 1)
target_youtube_video: Dreame L50 Ultra Review - The BEST Robot Vacuum of 2025...So Far
bilibili_product: Dreame X60 Master (追觅 X60 Master)
creator_matching_note: The public prompt intentionally gives a natural, slightly imprecise memory of the Bilibili creator name. Treat `Mona's Home / 莫娜` as a fuzzy clue, not an exact-name requirement. The correct creator is `莫娜的家Mona`, and the intended video is her no-ad, self-funded round-up that tests 12 new 2026 robot vacuums, Episode 1 (which covers Ecovacs X12 Pro, Narwal/云鲸 Freo 003, Roborock G30S Pro, and Dreame X60 Master among the first four). Credit the executor for resolving the clue to that creator/video even with corrected spelling. The YouTube clue (Vacuum Wars, a Dreame model rated best robot vacuum of 2025 so far) resolves to the Dreame L50 Ultra review.
expected_comparison_mode: Different Dreame models (Bilibili recommends the Dreame X60 Master; the Vacuum Wars video reviews the Dreame L50 Ultra), so compare model parameters and prices rather than forcing one common SKU.

youtube_dreame_l50_ultra: Vacuum Wars' current #1 overall on their Top 20 list at time of the video
dual brush roll + single side brush; ranked top-five all-time in carpet deep-clean (90%) and perfect 100% on flattened pet-hair-on-carpet test
two spinning mop pads, magnetic, auto-lift ~10.5mm over carpet; mop-along-the-grain option
ProLeap threshold crossing: single 42mm (1.65in), two-tiered up to 2.65in
top-mounted LiDAR navigation; front lasers + RGB camera + LED for obstacle avoidance (20/24)
large 6,400mAh battery but below-average measured efficiency (~823 sq ft/charge), has fast charging + recharge-and-resume
bilibili_dreame_x60_master: tested in Mona's Home Episode 1 among the first four machines
track/roller-type (履带式) mop pad with larger water-holding area, washes mop pads well
dual roller brush design: front rubber roller pats the carpet, rear rubber-bristle roller lifts dust — highlighted as good for homes with carpet
cleaning efficiency relatively slow (~100 minutes, similar to Ecovacs X12 Pro)
edge/side brush and rear roller can tangle long hair somewhat; mop-pad install called unusually complex
active-water (活水) real-time mop washing approach

screenshot_capture_notes: Captured 2026-06-20. Retail-availability reality at capture time: the Dreame L50 Ultra IS listed on Amazon US (~$849, 19,500 Pa). The Dreame X60 Master was NOT found as a distinct US retail listing: walmart_dreame_x60_master_search.png and amazon_dreame_x60_master_search.png show searches that return other Dreame models (X60 Max Ultra, L60, G10/C10 wet-dry sticks) but not the X60 Master itself, and walmart_dreame_l50_ultra_search.png likewise shows Walmart returning only Dreame wet-dry stick vacuums, not the L50 Ultra robot. These 'no exact match' screenshots are the correct, honest evidence for those product/platform combinations — they are not normal product pages. Spec anchors come from Dreame's official pages: dreame_l50_ultra_specs.png + dreame_l50_ultra_specs_2.png (L50 Ultra: 19,500 Pa, 2.65in two-step threshold, LDS, 6,400mAh) and dreame_x60_master_specs.png (X60 Master: 36,000 Pa, 8.8cm two-step threshold, VersaLift DToF + AI camera, 6,400mAh).
parameter_evidence_note: Use current official Dreame / Amazon / Walmart pages as factual anchors for prices and specs. Prices, availability, and regional listings are volatile; accept the executor's current screenshots/links over the hidden reference values when they conflict. The Dreame X60 Master may be sold under a regional name or have limited US retail availability — if a model is not listed on a US retailer, an honestly documented 'not available / out of stock' screenshot is acceptable rather than an invented price.
screenshot_availability_note: product_evidence/*.png are placeholders for human-prepared anchor screenshots and may be absent in this build; judge from text anchors and the executor's own screenshots when the prepared images are not present.
